TdB X81

OBD Information

Protocol: KWP2000
Send ID:
Recv ID:
Baudrate:
Func Addr: 51
Func Name: Tableau de bord

        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 22,
    "manualsend": true,
    "sentbytes": "2181",
    "name": "Trame VIN",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "VIN recu": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  }
]
